info.title: FLOWii API
info.description: FLOWii is a cloud application for managing your business more effectively. The API provides access to tasks, activities, business cases, cash flows, attendance, bank accounts, and more using JSON:API format.

post.description: Authenticate with username and password to obtain access and refresh tokens.

get.summary: Get tasks for a business case
Get communications for a business case
Get emails for a business case
Get attachments for a business case

post.summary: Upload an attachment to a business case

bearerAuth.description: Bearer access token obtained from /token endpoint
